name: E2B
notes: Users on the free Hobby tier are limited to 1-hour sandbox sessions, while Pro users can have sessions up to 24 hours.
price_headline: Per-second billing for vCPU and memory (rates on pricing page)
pricing_model: Per-second, based on vCPU and RAM usage, with a monthly platform fee for Pro plans.
summary: E2B is an open-source cloud infrastructure that provides isolated Linux sandbox environments for executing AI-generated code. It is used by developers building AI agents, LLM-powered apps, and agentic workflows.
